title: Duque de Caxias、RJ — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Duque de Caxias、RJの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Duque de CaxiasはRJにある人口929,449の都市です。A densely populated industrial city in Greater Rio, known for its oil refinery, chemical plants, and the Serra dos Órgãos mountain views.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
